# Physics Master A/L

> **උසස් පෙළ භෞතික විද්‍යාව ඉතාමත් සරලව සහ නිවැරදිව ඉගෙන ගන්න.**

Physics Master A/L is a premium EdTech platform dedicated to Sri Lankan students studying Advanced Level (A/L) Physics. The platform provides comprehensive syllabus notes, practical experiment guides, model papers, and interactive virtual simulators.

## Features
- Complete G.C.E A/L Physics syllabus coverage.
- Interactive virtual physics simulators and 3D models.
- Timed MCQ model papers with a marking scheme breakdown.
- Bilingual support: Sinhala and English.

## Target Audience
Sri Lankan high school students preparing for the G.C.E. Advanced Level (A/L) examination in the physical science or biological science streams.

## Contact Information
- Telephone: +94 713 080 010
- Location: Colombo, Sri Lanka
- Website: https://physics-masters.vercel.app
